title: Trump's immigration agenda: End natural-born citizenship

title: 'It's tight': Some Trump voters deny Harris' progress, but others are worried
shortDescription: Trump is holding rallies across America this week to blunt Harris' momentum. The mood at a Pennsylvania rally Saturday was a mix of confidence and concern.

title: He got the convention. Can Pritzker send blue-collar voters to Harris?
